title: Peppery Tender Portuguese Almond Stir-fry
description: A delicious and flavorful one-pot dish that combines tender almonds with a peppery kick in a savory sauce. Perfect for those following a low FODMAP diet, this easy recipe is both healthy and satisfying.
instructions: Preheat your broiler. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Spread the almond slices evenly on the prepared pan.
Broil for about 5 minutes or until they start to get golden brown, shaking the pan occasionally to ensure even cooking.
In a large skillet, heat 2 tbsp of oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic, cook for 3-4 minutes until softened.
Add red bell pepper, stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Push vegetables to one side of the pan and pour in eggs if using. Scramble eggs until fully cooked but still moist.
Combine scrambled eggs with vegetables and almond slices. Pour in soy sauce and lemon juice, stir well to coat all ingredients evenly.
Add red pepper flakes and salt to taste. Mix gently to distribute seasonings.
Let it cook for a few more minutes so the flavors meld together. Serve hot.
Serve immediately as the dish can get very warm from broiling.
